summary: Frontend-only testing of redesigned /stats page with 4 tabs (Overview, Letters, Time, Streak). All features tested via Playwright. All 20+ test assertions passed. No backend changes, no regressions found on existing features.

issues: Donut ring segments are visually non-prominent when most letters are 'New' (color #e7e5e4 is near-white and blends with the white card background). recharts-wrapper IS in the DOM and the chart IS mounted; the center label and legend render correctly. Not a bug — early-user state where 58/60 letters are 'New' produces a near-invisible large arc. Will become more visible as user studies more letters.

critical_code_review_comments: Donut chart for all-new state: when allNew=false but mostly-new (e.g. 58/60 New), the large gray-stone arc (#e7e5e4) is barely distinguishable from the white card background. Consider using a slightly darker shade or a border for the 'New' arc segment to improve visibility for new users.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing session data (2 letters studied: ura=Learning, iri=Learning)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stats page fully redesigned and working. 4 tabs: Overview (recharts donut + 4 summary cards), Letters (60-item grid, sort-mastery/sort-category, LetterDetailModal bottom sheet via framer-motion), Time (4 time cards), Streak (2 streak cards). All data-testids verified: tab-overview, tab-letters, tab-time, tab-streak, stats-back-btn, stats-refresh-btn, overview-studied-count, overview-mastered-count, letter-grid-item-{id} (all 60), sort-mastery, sort-category, letter-detail-modal, detail-attempts, detail-accuracy, stats-today-app-time, stats-today-practice-time, stats-total-app-time, stats-total-practice-time, stats-current-streak, stats-longest-streak. Home page streak banner and stats-nav-btn unaffected.

stats_page: Stats page loads at /stats with data-testid=stats-page
4 tab buttons present: tab-overview, tab-letters, tab-time, tab-streak
All 4 tabs navigable with framer-motion transitions
overview_tab: recharts-wrapper present in DOM (donut chart mounted)
Center label shows total letter count (60)
Legend shows all 4 mastery levels with counts
4 summary cards: Studied, Mastered, Learning, Struggling
letters_tab: sort-mastery button present and active by default
Clicking sort-category shows section headers: VOWEL CARRIERS, CONSONANTS, VOWELS, MATRAS, SPECIAL
Clicking a letter (ura) opens letter-detail-modal bottom sheet
home_page_regression: stats-nav-btn still present on home page
